name: Mubin Attar
tagline: I build and ship real, honest AI products — end to end.
ethos: Every number a user sees is genuinely computed — never faked. Real products, honest metrics, shipped.
summary: AI/ML Engineer shipping production software since 2022 and production AI since 2024 — GenAI/LLM applications, agentic & RAG systems, predictive ML, and healthcare-AI automation. Fluent across the stack (FastAPI, Next.js, PostgreSQL, Docker) with auth, CI/CD, and security hardening baked in. I turn ideas into deployed, maintainable software.
